flashcards.definition: 80 MC questions (90 min, 60% of score) + 3 FRQs (70 min, 40% of score).
Design an Investigation, Analyze an Environmental Problem, and Propose a Solution.
AP response structure: make a claim → support with specific evidence → explain reasoning connecting evidence to claim.
APES requires calculations: per capita rates, percent change, population growth, energy conversions.
FRQs scored on point-based rubrics rewarding specific, correct answers
